promotions.title: Keep-It Money Back Guarantee
content:
URL with details here: https://support.onnit.com/hc/en-us/articles/32132971656087-Keep-It-Money-Back-Guarantee

--

We believe in our supplements. If you’re trying something new for the first time and it’s not a fit, we’ve got your back. That’s what the Keep-It Guarantee is all about.

No need to return anything—we’ll make it right.

What’s Covered:

The Keep-It Guarantee applies to your first-time purchase of the following products:

Alpha Brain® 30ct

Alpha Brain Focus Shot (6-pack)

Creatine

Krill Oil

Melatonin Spray

New Mood® 30ct

Total Gut Health® 60ct

Shroom TECH® Sport 28ct

This guarantee is available for one refund per product, per customer. It only applies to your first purchase of each eligible item.

send_to_cs: Send to CS for post purchase inquiries, use PPI shortcut
Send to CS for account & order declined issues
Send to CS if cx wants to provide feedback
dos_and_donts: If cx asks about mixing the supplement with medication, direct them to their doctor or other medical professional
promo_and_exclusions: The code EARLYBIRD5 is no longer active, let cx know this & apologize
If cx reaches out wanting a code/discount use "SBS" shortcut
After sending the "SBS" shortcut, if a cx replies that they're interested in a subscription:
→ Give more info on how to start a subscription
If they mention they're not interested:

conversation.message_text: Helix Sleep: Welcome! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Helix Sleep: Congrats! Your offer has been activated and can be redeemed here: https://helixsleep.attn.tv/aZwoDvpJmVXT
Helix Sleep: PS Don't forget to add us to your phonebook!

Helix Sleep: Check out the Helix Kids Mattress — flippable comfort with firmer and softer sides that grows with your child.

Shop now: https://helixsleep.attn.tv/aaovLOR6-nc- .

Helix Sleep: Hi — check the mattresses built for personalized comfort and support, like the Luxe and Elite options.

You get free shipping and a risk-free home trial with easy returns.

Find your fit: https://helixsleep.attn.tv/aJu9bXMndMc6 .

Helix Sleep: Flip your child's sleep with the Helix Kids Mattress — a flippable design giving you firmer and softer sides for growing comfort and extra support you can feel.

Get free shipping and a risk-free home trial with easy returns.

Find the right fit for your kid: https://helixsleep.attn.tv/awX1Y8rqyjhE .

Helix Sleep: Start getting excited for your order! Our mattresses are handmade to order within 3-7 business days after confirmation. You'll be notified once it has shipped. 

Check the order status page for the most recent tracking information: https://helixsleep.attn.tv/aofsUyx-zsMo

Helix Sleep: Explore this collection of mattresses built for personalized comfort.

Find your fit: https://helixsleep.attn.tv/a6A7yf0N3pgn .

Helix Sleep: Check out the Helix Down Pillow in your cart, Mary — lightweight fabric with a unique 3-chamber design for stable support and plush comfort.

Shop now: https://helixsleep.attn.tv/aSMIoLpLuwyd .

Helix Sleep: Mary, check the pillows designed for personalized comfort and tailored support to help you sleep deeper tonight.

Get free shipping and a risk-free home trial with easy returns.

Rest better: https://helixsleep.attn.tv/a1CLMLgXJNlQ .

Helix Sleep: Hi Mary! Want to track your order? 

When your order ships you'll receive an email with your FedEx tracking information. The best way to access up-to-date information is through our order tracking page here: https://helixsleep.attn.tv/afPwQVReC6hK

Helix Sleep: Need help setting up your Helix mattress? 

1. Once your bed arrives, remove the mattress from the box and set it on your foundation while it's still encased in plastic. 

2. Remove the mattress from its plastic wrapping, give it 2 hours to regain its shape, and you're done! The embroidered Helix logo should be upright and positioned at the foot of the bed. Visit the instructions page here:
https://helixsleep.attn.tv/amAfFxU6NDHD

Helix Sleep: We want to be sure you love your purchase! That's why we offer a 120 night sleep trial, which begins on the day of delivery. 

If you're unhappy with your purchase for any reason, you can return it for a full refund within the 120 night trial period. Mattresses require a 30-Day break-in period before you're eligible for a return. Learn More: https://helixsleep.attn.tv/aKJcbGB56Ec1
We didn't get our mattress, we are still waiting for shipment information

Helix Sleep: Hi Mary! Thanks for letting me know, and sorry for the confusion! I see that your order is on its way and is expected to arrive on February 28. You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://helixsleep.attn.tv/a3BzOv8eeChA/
We received shipment notification about our mattress cover, that is arriving Saturday. It does not show that the mattress has shipped when I login, do you see something different?

Helix Sleep: I'm sorry for the confusion. The one I was referring to is your Kids Waterproof Mattress Encasement. The Helix Kids Mattress is still processing. Please note that our mattresses require 3-10 business days in production before shipping out. We usually ship via FedEx, and once shipped it will take 1-7 business days. The tracking link for it will be sent as soon as your order ships, so please keep an eye on your email inbox and spam/promo folders for it. Thank you for your patience!
We are hoping it arrives by the weekend ...could you let me know ?
Helix Sleep: I would be happy to check with the team if it could arrive by the weekend. Can I please have your email address?
Of course ...Marymac77@aol.com
Thank you!! we have our son bunking in our bed and it's quite crowded. We are anxiously awaiting the arrival.
Any news ?
Helix Sleep: Sorry for the slow reply. I will pass this along to my team and get back to you as soon as possible, hang tight!
That's okay.  Thank you 😊
Good morning I'm waiting for a refund for about a week. Can you tell me when it will be processed?
I tried calling ....Email is marymac77@aol.comI was also hoping to hear about a possible mattress shipping date.   Thanks a lot.

Helix Sleep: Hello! Once a refund has been issued, it can take 5-10 business days for the credit to reflect on your original form of payment. If you paid through one of our financing partners, your refund should reflect on your account within 3-5 business days. Please let me know if there's anything else I can help with.
Helix Sleep: Final hours! The Presidents Day Sale ends tonight-get 25% off Helix mattresses before it's gone ⏰ helixsleep.attn.tv/aFK1N8CQ2rJi
Good afternoon.  I never heard back about a potential mattress delivery date ...could you please check for me ? Marymac77@aol.com

Helix Sleep: Good afternoon! I'm sorry about that. I haven't heard from the team yet. Let me follow up on this, and I'll be in touch once I get an update. Alternatively, you can email us directly at help@helixsleep.com.
OK, thank you for your support. I did reach out via email. I never heard back.
Helix Sleep: We apologize for the wait! Rest assured, I'll message you the second the team replies. Have a wonderful day for now.
So my Oder stated it ships in 5- 7 business days.  We ordered 2/18....any news  please

Helix Sleep: I'm really sorry for the delay in providing an update for your order. I totally understand the frustration with this! I'm still waiting for a response from our team. You may also reach out and give us a call at 831-777-5976.
I called last week.  I didn't get an answer.
Same with email.  No response.

Helix Sleep: Thank you for sharing this with me, and I'm really sorry for the inconvenience this has caused. I sent another follow-up to the team regarding your order. Rest assured, I will send you a message as soon as I get an update! 

We truly appreciate your patience and understanding on this. Alternatively, since you also reached out to our team, please make sure to keep an eye out on your spam and promo folders; sometimes our emails end up there.

conversation.message_text: Braun: Welcome to Braun! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Braun: Welcome to the family! Use code BRA541F75U and get up to $125 off your first purchase. Not combinable with other offers. Shop now: braun.attn.tv/ayCqxakGaNuy .
Braun: Don't forget to save our contact for exclusive deals and updates!

Braun: Hi there, it's Chase from Braun. Thanks for checking out our site! https://braun.attn.tv/a-g7cA-Sz-L0 

Are you looking for a particular shaver or trimmer today?
The trimmer broke on my 9 series. I'm looking for a repair option or a discount to replace with a 9 PRO+.

Braun: Thank you for reaching out, and I'm sorry for the inconvenience. We honor a 2-year warranty for most of our products and it begins on the date of purchase. We cover any defects resulting from faulty materials or workmanship free of charge by either repairing or replacing the appliance at our discretion. To get service within the warranty period, hand in or send the complete appliance with your sales receipt to an authorized Braun CS center, you can find the info here: https://braun.attn.tv/as-KZ4CNnyV8

As for a discount for the 9 PRO+, I'm sorry, I don't have any codes available at the moment, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out! In the meantime, you can check out the already discounted Series 9 PRO+ Electric Shaver, 9599cc here: https://braun.attn.tv/aamSR9Pmy0zh

It's been more than 2 years. Even discounted pricing is a little out of control, but I have a question about the travel charging case. It doesn't look big enough to house the entire razor.Is it a hard case that protects the trimmer? I think my trimmer damage came on my last travel.
Thank you for the info.

Braun: I'm sorry about that! The mobile charging Power Case is actually for charging so that you can shave for up to 90 minutes without recharging. Customer feedback means a lot to us and helps us keep improving. I truly appreciate you sharing this, and I'll be sure to pass it along to our team for future consideration. Thank you so much!
Thank you for registering feedback. Even at the price I paid for a series 9 a few years ago, I expect it to last more than 5-6 years. I used to buy Braun thinking it will last a lifetime.
Template used: "Feedback 1 - All brands"; last updated: 2023-10-10 18:03:27.339

Braun: No problem at all! We want to make sure our customers are happy with our products and services, and customer feedback means a lot to us and helps us keep improving. I truly appreciate you sharing this, and please let me know if there's anything else I can help you with. I'm always here to assist.

send_to_cs: Send to CS immediately if cx did not receive their order
Send to CS immediately for post purchase inquiries about the status of the mold, or issues with the molds
Send to CS for pricing inquiries
Send to CS if cx is looking for a more specific piece not available on the website
Send to CS if cx is asking for a code and we don't have one
escalate: No escalations for this client, send everything to CS
tone: Use Teeth instead of Pieces (e.g 8 teeth at the top)
templates: If the image is not coming through a second time, send Broken Image temp
For CUSTOM GRILLZ & ACCESSORIES INQUIRIES for models not available on the website use PS shortcut
For urgent concerns/delayed escalation response use PS shortcut
For delayed orders and the customer is frustrated use PS shortcut
For customer service use shortcut CS which has both the direct email/number
dos_and_donts: Do not use the order history as a reference to order status
If customers want to cancel their order always ask for the reason for cancellation
drive_to_purchase: Don't recommend pre-made grillz! Upsell to fitted and custom grillz
When recommending an item, let the cx know they can customize their order on the product page
When recommending an item, ask the cx if they are working with a budget
Use LFG shortcut to gather information and provide recommendations when cx ask about:
